title: [CI:DOCS] Cirrus: No upload snap for docs job
body:
Previously, the upload-snap job was running during post-merge testing when the magic ci-docs string was present in the PR description.  This fixes that and makes all the `only_if`'s more consistent.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>
